response.justification: While Bogdan possesses over 15 years of robust software engineering experience and a demonstrated entrepreneurial background, his profile aligns more closely with a Staff Full-Stack Engineer than a Director-level Principal Engineer in AI Strategy. He lacks the deep, recognized AI/ML expertise, strategic customer advisory experience, and advanced AI-related degree preferred for this high-level leadership role.
strengths: Exceeds the 15-year minimum requirement for software engineering experience.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and startup experience as the founder of GISCollective.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized AI and machine learning expertise expected for a Director-level AI strategy role.
No evidence of experience advising strategic customers on cutting-edge cloud and AI technology adoption.
Does not possess the preferred Master's or PhD degree in an AI-related field.
